title: Create: Extended Signals
description: A mod that adds and expands on train signalling system for Create-based trains!
body:
# **Forge only**
This mod is built using the Forge mod loading framework. Requires Forge 1.20.1, 47.3.30 or later.

# Early mod - Work In Progress

Is an addon that expands on Create Train Signals to provide with more varied and functional signals.

Signals work with the built in Create Train Signals but also with the signal boxes provided in the mod. Signal boxes can be chained to provide distant signalling capability and other utilities.

ATC Controllers can be linked to the Signal boxes and as such will provide new speed limitations for both scheduled trains and players.

Current signals:
- 🇸🇪 Sweden

In progress:
- 🇵🇱 Poland

Planned:
- 🇬🇧 UK/Great Britain
- 🇯🇵 Japan
- 🇳🇱 Dutch
- 🇩🇪 German


# Want some sneak peeks?
Join our Discord!
